name: Sonic Max
explanation: A psychoacoustic clarity and phase enhancer. The signal is split into low, mid and high bands; the lows are delayed a touch to re-align their timing against the highs, restoring transient punch. Process lifts high-frequency presence for air and definition, while Lo Contour blooms the low end for weight and body. The bands recombine through a soft output trim and dry/wet Mix, so the effect stays subtle and bounded. Controls: Process, Lo Contour, Output and Mix.
